response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project work via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed data pipelines — key requirements for the role. His DLang and Node.js background shows systems-level capability, but not the specific domain or language proficiency needed for routing tiling.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Proven ability to work across languages and systems (DLang, Node.js, Linux)
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C++ or Rust in production routing or geospatial pipelines
Lacks explicit exposure to distributed systems concepts like fault tolerance or consistency in navigation contexts
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js, not low-latency C++ systems or map tile optimization
